---
title: "test_muninn_sync_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_muninn_sync_empire.py"
loc: 60
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.60
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 6.83
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating mock_root, test_coordinator_prioritizes_critical_ledger_missions. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [os](file://os)
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)

### Exports
- `mock_root`
- `test_coordinator_prioritizes_critical_ledger_missions`
- `test_silence_protocol_blocks_flight_on_recent_activity`
- `test_silence_protocol_allows_flight_after_threshold`
- `test_automated_breach_escalation_flags_ledger`
